title: Input row import and deduplication
acceptance: Every non-cluster and normalized cluster requirement is represented once with owner and source

title: SBLR operation contract design
acceptance: Every operation has authority class binary contract validation diagnostics and execution policy

title: Binary format and compatibility design
acceptance: Every new symbol has versioning integrity and unsupported-version refusal behavior

title: Encoder decoder and parser-admission support
acceptance: Every new symbol round-trips and rejects malformed input

title: Engine internal API execution routes
acceptance: Every non-cluster operation executes through engine-owned API or exact policy refusal

title: Cluster and external authority routes
acceptance: 439 cluster/external authority rows fail closed, preserve provider admission, and forbid parser/reference authority

title: Diagnostics result vectors and support evidence
acceptance: Every one of 2760 SBLR operation rows has stable result vectors diagnostics redaction support evidence and proof coverage

title: Full SBLR proof and audit
acceptance: All 2760 operation rows are cross-checked across P0-P6 matrices and executable P3-P7 proof gates with authority boundaries enforced
